zh.Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登
英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron William de Noers "Norreys"於1045年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登時，他的父親William De Noers I26歲，母親Mrs. William de Norris20歲。他於1070年與Mrs William Noers在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1102年在英國享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Noers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch and German: variant of   Koers  .

variants.name: Koers
meanings: Dutch: variant of Kors or of Koerts (also Coerts), a patronymic from the personal name Koert, a short form of Conrad , formed with genitival -s.
German: variant of   Kohrs  . Compare   Coers  .

nameMeanings.name: "Norreys"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron William de Noers "Norreys" was born in 1045, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William De Noers I, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. William de Norris, was 20. He married Mrs William Noers in 1070, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1102, in England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron William de Noers "Norreys" est né en 1045, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Noers I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Norris, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mrs William Noers en 1070, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1102, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Baron William de Noers "Norreys"(이)가 1045년 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Noers I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William de Norris(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1070년 영국에서 Mrs William Noers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1102년 영국에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron William de Noers "Norreys" родился в 1045 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Noers I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Norris, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs William Noers в 1070 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1102 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
